originalTitle: GPU Drive Day 2 PufferLib Support - Live Reinforcement Learning Dev
title: Debugging Madrona GPU Compilation and Adding Native GPU Drive Support to PufferLib
summary: Worked on integrating the GPU Drive simulator into PufferLib, focusing on compiling Madrona with GPU support and implementing a native vectorization backend. Encountered compilation issues with CUDA and Docker, but made progress on creating a functional GPU binding.
